topRisks: Lack of automated security testing in CI/CD (Low)
Database scale-up for very large transaction volumes (Low)

features.name: Authentication & Session Management
features.logicJustification: Implemented secure password hashing (Argon2-equivalent/Bcrypt), JWT-based session management, and server-side token validation.

features.name: Inventory Management
features.logicJustification: All operations protected by RBAC (Admin only). Optimistic concurrency and transaction logging fully functional.

features.name: Request System
features.logicJustification: Complete lifecycle with reservation logic. Users can only access their own requests; admins have global view.

features.name: Issuance Workflow
features.logicJustification: Secure issuance process restricted to Admins. Atomic transactions ensure data consistency.

features.name: Reporting & Analytics
features.logicJustification: All reporting endpoints secured and optimized. Logic for stockout prediction verified.

features.name: User Management
features.logicJustification: Full Admin CRUD with secure password resets and account deactivation logic.

features.name: Transaction History
features.logicJustification: Complete audit trail. Export features secured and togglable via flags.

features.name: API Security / Authorization
features.logicJustification: Implemented global middleware for JWT verification and route-level RBAC enforcement.
